mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_USER_ROLE( ID, USER_ID, ROLE_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_USER_ROLE_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createdAt} )
INSERT INTO TF_USER_ROLE( ID, USER_ID, ROLE_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_USER_ROLE_PK.nextval, #{empno}, 3, sysdate )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_USER_ROLE SET ROLE_ID = (Select ID FROM TF_ROLE WHERE NAME = #{role}) WHERE USER_ID = #{empno}
